purpose: Directional-edge and expression-comparison starter dataset manifest.
notes: Populate this manifest before running evidence-grade backtests.
Tier 1 data is acceptable for directional-edge and initial expression comparison.
Tier 2 data is required before trusting stop, profit-taking, rolling, or live-readiness conclusions.

split_policy.holdout_policy: Most recent window reserved as untouched holdout per frozen strategy spec.
split_policy.split_basis: Computed on 732 full NYSE trading days (excluding half-days) shared by trading_calendar and es_intraday in dataset-v1.

holdout.touched_by_v1_note: Phase 1 directional-edge-v1 ran against the full dataset including holdout (PR #55, before split was pinned). Per spec freeze rule, the holdout slot for v1 is now consumed; v2 candidates may use this same holdout window only after they are themselves frozen as STRATEGY-SPEC-v2.

datasets.name: spx_spot_intraday
known_limitations: Do not use 1-minute spot alone to validate fine-grained stop behavior.

datasets.name: es_or_mes_intraday
datasets.license: Databento Standard self-serve (single-seat, research, no redistribution)
known_limitations: Databento flagged 3+ days as 'degraded' quality at acquisition: 2025-09-17, 2025-09-24, 2025-11-28 (warning truncated; query metadata.get_dataset_condition for the full list).
Continuous front-month is calendar-roll (`c` rank 0); roll boundaries introduce small gaps in price level not present in single-contract series.
1-minute OHLCV is bar-of-trades, not bar-of-quotes; for mid-price use, reconstruct from MBP-1 / CMBP-1 instead.

datasets.name: spx_0dte_call_chain
datasets.resolution: Entry-window and exit-window coverage minimum; 1-5s preferred later
known_limitations: Tier 1 chain data is sufficient for initial expression comparison but not final stop/rolling conclusions.

datasets.name: trading_calendar
known_limitations: Add event tags later when testing regime and event filters.
Half-day detection compares NYSE close to 16:00 ET (anything earlier flagged is_half_day=true). Matches bull_call.calendar.session_times semantics.

quality_checks: duplicate option rows rejected or deduplicated explicitly
